title: This Trading Mistake Cost Me Thousands - Can You Spot It?
description: Test your ICT trading knowledge! Can you identify the deadly mistake that destroys most traders' accounts? This simple quiz could save your trading career.
script: Two years of losses. One deadly mistake. Can you spot it? What kills most ICT traders? A) Wrong entry timing B) Bad risk management C) Chasing every setup Answer: C! Chasing every setup destroys accounts. Patience beats frequency every time. Quality over quantity wins. Follow R2F Trading for more tips like this.
